lint.command: N/A (no lint command configured in .factory/services.yaml or package.json scripts)

blockingIssues.description: Whitespace-only invalid files are treated as live streams instead of format errors: blank lines are skipped, content is considered present once bytes are read, and EOF enters live-tail mode without validating a header. This can hang instead of exiting with an invalid-format error.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update typecheck guidance to use `bunx tsc --noEmit` (matching mission AGENTS and .factory/services.yaml) to avoid avoidable command failures/churn.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Observed across all 4 reviewed cli-refactor features: workers attempted `bun tsc --noEmit` first, then had to fall back to `bunx tsc --noEmit`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify skillFeedback expectations: if tests-first TDD is not followed, workers should set `followedProcedure` to false and include deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cast-tail-polish review observed implementation was created before tests while handoff reported followedProcedure=true.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document pre-existing PTY timing flakes in .factory/library.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: flakiness was reported in one prior handoff but was not reproduced in the current full validator run.
